creator: beech@FreeBSD.org
text:
Port does not build:

===>  Configuring for postgis-jdbc-1.3.2
===>  Building for postgis-jdbc-1.3.2
***
*** WARNING: This Makefile is deprecated for a build using Ant 
(build.xml)
***
*** If you wish to build a standard PostGIS JDBC driver, please use 
the Ant build
*** If you wish to build a JTS-enabled PostGIS JDBC driver, or run the 
online
*** regression tests, you will currently still need to use this 
Makefile
***
mkdir -p ./stubbin/
/usr/local/diablo-jdk1.5.0/bin/javac -d ./stubbin/ 
stubs/org/postgresql/*.java
Fatal error 'kse_create() failed
' at line 444 in file /usr/src/lib/libpthread/thread/thr_kern.c (errno 
= 2)
gmake: *** [stubcompile] Error 1
*** Error code 2

--
